title: phyllanthus torrentium var. torrentium
intro: Phyllanthus torrentium var. torrentium is a plant species that belongs to the family Phyllanthaceae, commonly known as the Phyllanthus tree or the Torrent Tree. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of P. torrentium var. torrentium include reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and aiding in the treatment of liver and kidney disorders. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, tonics, and other medicinal products.
